event: The Mi'raj — Muhammad's Ascension into Heaven
symbols: spiral or circular form at center — the cosmic journey upward through the heavens, the vortex of divine encounter
scattered triangular fragments — shattered earthly perception, the dissolution of material reality in the face of the transcendent
dark field with luminous elements — the night sky through which the Prophet ascended, darkness pierced by revelation
Arabic or numerical inscriptions — the sacred word, divine knowledge transmitted during the heavenly ascent
description: An abstract contemporary composition dominated by a deep black field filled with scattered purple and violet triangular or crystalline fragments radiating outward from a central circular form. The central element contains what appear to be Arabic numerals or calligraphic forms in a lighter tone against a lilac-white disc. The fragments create a sense of cosmic explosion or implosion. The work is set within a decorative border of grey-lavender with golden linear framing.

_meta.title: Recounting of Mohammed's Ascension Into Heaven
